summary: Frontend e2e testing of the 4 new UX features for Dalaa Beauty (WhatsApp/Email mailto, dual print layouts A4/80mm/58mm PDF, appointment confirmations, in-app APK updater). Logged in as master `bahaa`, seeded a product and a customer via UI, created an invoice via POS checkout (TSE signed OK, no unofficial banner), and exercised the full InvoiceView toolbar. All 7 toolbar buttons render, are enabled for a signed invoice, and the A4/80mm/58mm PDF buttons each trigger a browser download with the expected filenames (INV-000001.pdf, INV-000001_80mm.pdf, INV-000001_58mm.pdf). WhatsApp/Email/Send-PDF clicks do NOT throw and Send PDF also triggers a download. Settings page shows the new WhatsApp template textarea (default German starts with 'Vielen Dank für Ihren Besuch — شكراً لزيارتكم'), the Reset button, and the Updater URL input with Check-for-Updates button. Empty update_url does not crash. Login works. RTL layout renders correctly on InvoiceView and Settings.

issues: Console hydration warning: `<span>` cannot be a child of `<option>` (Products.jsx line ~100). Caused by a dev-tool instrumentation span inside the VAT <option> — cosmetic, does not break UI, but produces a React warning in dev console. Consider moving dynamic content outside <option> children or using {value}-only option text.

action_items: (Low prio) Eliminate the `<span>` inside `<option>` hydration warning on Products.jsx (dev-mode only, does not affect prod).

Manual verification recommended: appointments Mail/Printer buttons and post-save confirm prompt — verified by code review (Appointments.jsx lines 87-98, 127, 160, 437-450, 490-504) but could not be auto-tested because no appointment existed in the freshly-seeded IDB during the run. Main agent can self-test by creating an appointment with a customer that has email on file.

Manual verification recommended: Update-checker fake-URL toast rendering (code path verified in updater.js — fetchManifest rejects on non-JSON/404, UpdateChecker surfaces error toast). Empty-URL does not crash (verified).
critical_code_review_comments: InvoiceView.jsx useEffect at line 37-45 fetches ALL customers just to find one by id — use GET /api/customers/{id} if router supports it, or memoize across renders. For 1000+ customers this is wasteful.

fillTemplate() strips trailing ' €' via regex `/\s?€$/` — fragile for locales that prefix the symbol (de-DE uses suffix, ar-EG may prefix). Consider formatting total without currency inside the WhatsApp/Email body builder instead of post-hoc stripping.
updater.js FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS = 10s may be too short on slow mobile networks; expose as env/setting.

InvoiceReceipt and AppointmentReceipt render at `top:-10000px` — correct, but html2canvas on Android Capacitor webview sometimes misses web fonts; consider preloading display font in the receipt template.

Settings.jsx: two `input[type='url']` inputs (backup URL + update URL) share similar placeholders — add distinct data-testid attributes (e.g., `settings-update-url-input`, `settings-update-check-button`) for more stable automated testing.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (core invoice PDF/WhatsApp/Email/Send-PDF/Settings all pass; appointments + update-error-toast visually unconfirmed due to seeding limits)

test_credentials: Master bahaa / 12abAB!? (IndexedDB-seeded). Seeded: TEST Product @ €15 stock 50, TEST Buyer (phone 4917612345678, email buyer@example.com). Invoice INV-000001 was TSE-signed and downloadable in all 3 formats.
seed_data_creation: Created via UI: 1 product (TEST Product), 1 customer (TEST Buyer), 1 invoice (INV-000001). Data persists in browser IndexedDB only — no server-side cleanup needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is offline-first Dexie/IndexedDB. axios calls to /api/* are intercepted by services/router.js — direct window.fetch('/api/...') does NOT hit the router and returns 404. Always seed data via the UI (add product/customer) or by using the app's axios instance. POS checkout auto-navigates to /invoices/{id} on success. TSE signing IS mocked via /app/backend/server.py but works and produces `tse_status=signed` so PDF/share buttons are enabled. Toolbar data-testids verified: print-invoice-button, pdf-invoice-button, receipt-80-button, receipt-58-button, whatsapp-invoice-button, email-invoice-button, send-pdf-invoice-button, storno-from-view-button, invoice-unofficial-banner. Settings: whatsapp_template textarea + Reset button + update_url input (placeholder mentions github). Appointments Mail/Printer icons are rendered only when appointments exist (card view in list mode).
rca of the issue: N/A — no critical bugs found. Only cosmetic dev-mode hydration warning in Products.jsx VAT <option>.
